settings.heading: Clinically Studied. Proven Results.
settings.subheading: In a 60-day clinical study, participants using our Mullein + Chlorophyll Tincture reported real results:

settings.title: Breathe Easier, Naturally
settings.content: Reset Sticks open your nasal passages in seconds using natural plant oils. No waiting, just clear, open airways whenever you need them*

settings.title: Restore Natural Energy
settings.content: Congestion and inflamed airways drain you. As your breathing clears up, you stop working so hard just to get through the day. More air in means more energy out*

settings.title: Strengthen Lung Resilience
settings.content: BetterLungs® helps your immune system stop overreacting to pollen, dust, and dander. Take it daily and each allergy season gets a little easier than the last*

settings.subtitle-header: Natural lung support, backed by science and made for everyday vitality
settings.heading: Your Daily Breath of Balance
Better Science, Back to Nature
settings.text: At Betterbrand, we believe natural is better.Founded by Dr. Chris, a former Army Combat Medic and Doctor of Pharmacy, we’re redefining wellness through honesty, precision, and proven natural science.While Big Pharma builds dependency, we build trust, creating natural solutions your body already understands, backed by real science and transparency.

settings.title: Open the bottle
settings.text: Twist the cap to open and get the dropper ready for use.

settings.title: Add the Drops
settings.text: Place 2 full droppers into 8 oz of water — or take them under your tongue for faster absorption.

settings.title: Drink the Water
settings.text: Drink 8 oz of water to stay hydrated and help loosen stubborn mucus buildup.

settings.title: Mullein
settings.text: Rich in antioxidants, mullein helps clear mucus, soothe inflammation, and protect delicate lung tissue. A time-tested herbal ally for clean, open breathing.

settings.title: Chlorophyll
settings.text: A powerhouse for cellular detox, chlorophyll supports oxygen flow, reduces oxidative stress, and renews daily energy. Pure, green vitality for your lungs and body.

settings.question: Does This Help With COPD, Asthma, Bronchitis, Or The Common Cold?
settings.answer: We designed BetterLungs® to support healthy respiratory and immune systems while keeping everyone in mind. Our ingredients have been studied extensively in many settings! With that said, no supplement can make claims regarding any diagnosis. As always, we recommend that you check with your doctor or pharmacist before starting any new dietary supplement as they have your full medical history available

settings.question: Is It Safe To Take COPD And/Or Asthma Medication With BetterLungs?
settings.answer: While all of our formulations are pieced together by a Doctor of Pharmacy, we recommend that you check with your doctor or pharmacist before starting any new dietary supplement as they have your full medical history available.Does This Help My Lungs If I Vape Or Smoke?

settings.question: Does This Help My Lungs If I Vape Or Smoke?
settings.answer: The ingredients in BetterLungs were selected with smokers, and their lung health, in mind. The idea for the product came from our Chief Scientist who wanted to help the smokers in his family and those with chronic bronchitis and COPD.

settings.question: Can I Take This For Extended Periods Of Time?
settings.answer: Most of the ingredients work better the longer you take them, so definitely!

settings.question: How Long Does It Take For This Product To Work?
settings.answer: While some customers notice positive effects in the first few days, we tell our customers to give the product 4 weeks for maximum effect.

settings.question: How can I get in touch with the team?
settings.answer: If you have questions, you can give us a call at 1-877-851-8979 or email us at hello@betterbrandhealth.com.
